name: Menu
description: Menus show a temporary list of choices on a surface — overflow actions behind a ⋮ button, row actions in a data table, or a list of options from a control. They appear on demand and dismiss on selection or outside click.
keyRule: Use a menu for secondary or overflow actions. Don't hide a view's primary action in a menu — promote it to a button in the toolbar.

variants.name: Overflow menu
variants.whenToUse: Secondary actions behind a ⋮ in toolbars, cards, and table rows.

variants.name: Dropdown (exposed) menu
variants.whenToUse: A field that opens a list to choose one value (see also Select on the Text fields page).

variants.name: Context menu
variants.whenToUse: Right-click actions on a desktop row or item.

variants.name: Cascading submenu
variants.whenToUse: Grouped choices that expand to a second level (use sparingly).

anatomy.name: Trigger
anatomy.description: the control that opens the menu (overflow ⋮, a button, or a field).

anatomy.name: Surface
anatomy.description: an elevated container holding the items.

anatomy.name: Menu item
anatomy.description: one choice; may carry a leading icon and a trailing shortcut/meta.

behaviors.name: Open & dismiss
behaviors.description: Opens at the trigger; closes on selection, Escape, or an outside click. It should never cover its own trigger if avoidable.

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: Selecting an item performs the action and closes the menu; a stateful menu marks the current choice.

behaviors.name: Keyboard
behaviors.description: Arrow keys move focus, Enter activates, Escape closes; typing jumps to a matching item.

props.name: items
props.description: Choices and dividers shown on the menu surface; each choice may carry a leading icon and trailing shortcut/meta.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the menu surface is open.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called on selection, Escape, or an outside click, per the Open & dismiss behavior.

props.name: variant
props.description: Which trigger pattern opened this menu (overflow menu, dropdown/exposed menu, context menu, or cascading submenu).

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base mdc-menu class.

doThis: Group destructive actions and set them apart with a divider.
Use a menu for overflow, not for a view's primary action.
dontDoThis: Don't bury frequently-used actions in an overflow menu.
Don't nest more than one submenu level.
Don't use a menu where a few options fit better as visible buttons or tabs.
accessibility: The trigger exposes aria-haspopup and expanded state.
The surface uses a menu role with menuitem children.
Focus moves into the menu on open and returns to the trigger on close.
Full keyboard support (arrows, Enter, Escape, type-ahead).

related.name: Dialog
related.why: Choices with consequences that need confirmation

related.name: Button
related.why: The visible trigger the menu anchors to
